title: VPC and Networking Architecture Setup
description: Define Terraform modules for VPC, Public/Private Subnets, NAT Gateways, and Security Groups following AWS Well-Architected Framework.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: VPC created with CIDR block 10.0.0.0/16; Private subnets isolated; NAT Gateways configured
definition_of_done: Terraform applied in staging; Connectivity tests passed

title: EKS Control Plane and Node Group Provisioning
description: Implement Terraform for EKS Control Plane and Managed Node Groups. Configure IAM Roles for Service Accounts (IRSA).
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: EKS Cluster version 1.29+ active; OIDC provider associated; Node groups in private subnets
definition_of_done: Cluster active; kubectl access verified via IAM

title: RDS PostgreSQL Terraform Module
description: Develop Terraform for RDS instance (db.t3.medium), security groups allowing EKS access, and subnet groups.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: RDS instance in private subnets; Security group allows EKS traffic on 5432; Storage encryption enabled
deployment_notes: Use db.t3.medium for non-prod, r6g for prod

title: Passport-JWT Strategy Implementation
description: Configure passport-jwt with AWS Cognito JWKS for token signature verification.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Valid Cognito token passes; Expired token throws 401; JWKS caching implemented
definition_of_done: Unit tests passing; Postman collection updated

title: MFA Challenge State Management
description: Implement Zustand store logic to handle the SOFTWARE_TOKEN_MFA challenge response from AWS Amplify/Cognito.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Detects MFA_REQUIRED state; Stores session object securely; Handles challenge callbacks
definition_of_done: State flow unit tested; UI connected to store

title: RabbitMQ Consumer Infrastructure
description: Setup NestJS microservice with RabbitMQ consumer. Configure Dead Letter Queues (DLQ) and retry policies.
sprint_goal: Implement AI Processing Pipeline & Vendor Management
acceptance_criteria: Connects to RabbitMQ; Consumes sow.uploaded events; DLQ configured
definition_of_done: Consumer running in EKS; Message processing verified
deployment_notes: Requires ENV variables for MQ connection

title: Raw Body Middleware for Signature Verification
description: Implement NestJS middleware to capture raw request body for Stripe signature verification.
acceptance_criteria: Middleware preserves raw buffer; Stripe signature verification passes; Rejects modified bodies
definition_of_done: Verified against Stripe CLI; Middleware applied to webhook route

title: Enable pgvector and Parameter Configuration
description: Configure custom DB Parameter Group to enable pgvector extension. Script validation of extension functionality.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Infrastructure & Identity Foundation
acceptance_criteria: pgvector extension active; Test vector insertion succeeds; Parameters tuned
definition_of_done: Vector search query verified in staging
